title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Zara India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Zara India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
